description: Python package dependencies including FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, JWT libraries, testing frameworks
acceptance_criteria: All required dependencies are listed with appropriate version constraints

description: Project configuration with build system, tool configurations for linting, formatting, and type checking
acceptance_criteria: Project can be built and development tools are properly configured

description: Environment-based configuration management using Pydantic Settings for database, JWT, and app settings
acceptance_criteria: Configuration can be loaded from environment variables with sensible defaults

description: Database connection setup with async SQLAlchemy, session management, and connection pooling
acceptance_criteria: Database sessions can be created and managed asynchronously

description: SQLAlchemy User model with authentication fields (email, password hash, timestamps)
acceptance_criteria: User model can be created, queried, and supports unique email constraint

description: Password hashing with bcrypt, JWT token generation/validation, and authentication utilities
acceptance_criteria: Passwords can be hashed and verified, JWT tokens can be created and decoded

description: Custom exception classes for business logic errors and authentication failures
acceptance_criteria: Custom exceptions can be raised and caught with appropriate error messages

description: Circuit breaker implementation for external service calls with configurable thresholds
acceptance_criteria: Circuit breaker opens on failures and resets after recovery period

description: Pydantic models for authentication requests and responses (login, register, token)
acceptance_criteria: Request/response data is properly validated and serialized

description: Pydantic models for user data transfer objects with proper validation rules
acceptance_criteria: User data is validated according to business rules (email format, password strength)

description: Centralized logging configuration with structured output and correlation IDs
acceptance_criteria: Logs are formatted consistently with appropriate log levels

description: Authentication endpoints for user registration, login, and token refresh with proper validation
acceptance_criteria: Users can register with unique emails, login with credentials, and receive JWT tokens

description: User management endpoints for profile operations with JWT authentication required
acceptance_criteria: Authenticated users can view and update their profile information

description: FastAPI application setup with middleware, exception handlers, CORS, and route registration
acceptance_criteria: Application starts successfully with all routes registered and Swagger docs accessible

description: Main application package initialization file
acceptance_criteria: Package can be imported without errors

description: Models package initialization with model exports
acceptance_criteria: Models can be imported from the package

description: Schemas package initialization with schema exports
acceptance_criteria: Schemas can be imported from the package

description: API package initialization with router exports
acceptance_criteria: API routers can be imported from the package

description: Core package initialization with core utilities exports
acceptance_criteria: Core utilities can be imported from the package

description: Utils package initialization with utility exports
acceptance_criteria: Utilities can be imported from the package
